## Pages
- [404 - Page Not Found | Basketball Referee Manager](/notfound): No description available
- [About Us - Basketball Reff](/about): Learn about the mission and vision behind Basketball Reff, the leading platform for basketball officiating.
- [Calendar - Referee Management](/calendar): View your game schedule and manage your availability.
- [Contact Us - Basketball Reff](/contact): Get in touch with the Basketball Reff team for support, feedback, or inquiries.
- [Dashboard - Basketball Referee Manager](/dashboard): View your referee dashboard with upcoming games, earnings, and performance statistics.
- [Games - Basketball Referee Manager](/games): Track your game history, performance statistics, and manage game reports as a basketball referee.
- [Login - Basketball Referee Manager](/login): Log in to your Basketball Referee Manager account to access your schedule, games, and management tools.
- [Management - Basketball Referee Manager](/manager): Manage tournaments, assign games, and oversee referees for your league.
- [Messages - Basketball Referee Manager](/messages): Communicate with league managers and other referees through the messaging system.
- [Payments - Basketball Referee Manager](/payments): Track your referee payments, earnings, and payment history for basketball games.
- [Performance Analytics - Basketball Referee Manager](/performanceanalytics): Detailed performance analytics for basketball referees, including earnings, game history, and ratings.
- [Profile - Basketball Referee Manager](/profile): Manage your referee profile, view statistics, and update your personal information.
- [Register - Basketball Referee Manager](/register): Create your secure account.
- [Schedule - Basketball Referee Manager](/schedule): View and manage your game schedule, assignments, and availability as a basketball referee.
- [Settings - Basketball Referee Manager](/settings): Manage your account settings, notifications, and preferences for the Basketball Referee Manager app.
- [Submit Game Report - Basketball Referee Manager](/gamereport): Submit your post-game report including final score, incidents, and notes.
